positive: A stylized celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, radiating soft starlight. The owl is rendered in a minimalist, geometric line art style with deep indigo, silver, and gold accents. The background features abstract constellations and nebula clouds in ethereal gradients of violet, cyan, and midnight blue. Composition is centered, creating a strong, clean silhouette suitable for apparel. High contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low detail, poor anatomy, messy lines, gradient wash, disfigured
